response:
Brittany uses [1/4] ounce of shampoo every other day, which means she consumes a total of 455 ounces over the course of a leap year that has 366 days. Since she washes her hair on 183 days, the calculation shows she will need [4] bottles of the 14-ounce shampoo to cover the entire year.

This estimation ensures she has enough product without running out before the year concludes, assuming she maintains her current routine consistently. The total volume required is slightly more than what three bottles would provide, making the purchase of four bottles the necessary choice for her daily needs.
